2605.22344.title: Bernini: Latent Semantic Planning for Video Diffusion
2605.22344.paper_summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) and diffusion models have each reached remarkable maturity: MLLMs excel at reasoning over heterogeneous multimodal inputs with strong semantic grounding, while diffusion models synthesize images and videos with photorealistic fidelity. We argue that these two families can be unified through a simple division of labor: MLLMs perform semantic planning, while diffusion models render pixels from high-level semantic guidance and low-level visual features. Building on this idea, we propose Bernini, a unified framework for video generation and editing. An MLLM-based planner predicts the target semantic representation directly in the ViT embedding space, and a DiT-based renderer synthesizes pixels conditioned on this plan, augmented by text features and, for editing, source VAE features for detail preservation. Because semantics serve as the interface, the planner and renderer can be trained separately and only lightly co-trained, preserving the pretrained strengths of both components while keeping training efficient. To better handle multiple visual inputs, we introduce Segment-Aware 3D Rotary Positional Embedding (SA-3D RoPE), and further incorporate chain-of-thought reasoning in the planner to better transfer understanding into generation. Bernini achieves state-of-the-art performance across a wide range of video generation and editing benchmarks, with the MLLM's pretrained understanding translating into strong generalization on challenging editing tasks.
2605.22344.paper_summary_zh: 多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）和擴散模型各自達到了顯著的成熟度：MLLMs 在對異質多模態輸入進行推理時表現出色，具有強大的語義基礎，而擴散模型則以照片真實的保真度合成圖像和視頻。我們認為這兩個家族可以通過簡單的分工來統一：MLLMs 執行語義規劃，而擴散模型則根據高層語義指導和低層視覺特徵渲染像素。在這一想法的基礎上，我們提出了 Bernini，一個統一的視頻生成和編輯框架。基於 MLLM 的規劃器直接在 ViT 嵌入空間中預測目標語義表示，而基於 DiT 的渲染器則根據這一計劃合成像素，並通過文本特徵以及在編輯時通過源 VAE 特徵來增強細節保留。由於語義作為接口，規劃器和渲染器可以分開訓練，並且僅輕度共同訓練，保留兩個組件的預訓練優勢，同時保持訓練的高效性。為了更好地處理多個視覺輸入，我們引入了段落感知 3D 旋轉位置嵌入（SA-3D RoPE），並進一步在規劃器中納入鏈式思維推理，以更好地將理解轉化為生成。Bernini 在廣泛的視頻生成和編輯基準上達到了最先進的性能，MLLM 的預訓練理解轉化為在挑戰性編輯任務上的強泛化能力。
2605.22344.author: Bernini Team et.al.
2605.22344.authors: Bernini Team, Chenchen Liu, Junyi Chen, Lei Li, Lu Chi, Mingzhen Sun, Zhuoying Li, Yi Fu, Ruoyu Guo, Yiheng Wu, Ge Bai, Zehuan Yuan
